en_US: There’s a wrecked stone pillar up
ahead.
I wonder what it is?
It’s got me very curious.
{STRVAR_1 3, 0, 0}: Ta-daah!
Kept me waiting again, {STRVAR_1 3, 1, 0}!
Let’s see how much tougher you and
I have gotten, right here and now!
Hey, you’re a Trainer now. You’re
expected to be ready for a battle.
No whining! No waiting!
Let’s get the show started!
{STRVAR_1 3, 0, 0}: Waaah!
It goes to show my surefire winning
strategy doesn’t work.
I guess I have to grind it out and
toughen up the team a bit at a time.
Anyway! I’m off to Solaceon Town to
check out the ancient ruins there.
See ya, {STRVAR_1 3, 1, 0}!
